steps.title: Use relative years to make a Desmos table
steps.content: Let $t$ be years after $1995$. Then $1995$ is $t=0$, $2015$ is $t=20$, and $2019$ is $t=24$. The known points are $(0,55)$ and $(20,217)$, with population measured in thousands.

steps.title: Evaluate the fitted model at 2019
steps.content: The regression gives $m=8.1$ and $b=55$, so the model is $y=8.1t+55$. For $2019$, plug in $t=24$: $$y=8.1(24)+55=249.4.$$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $249$ thousand.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The requested value of $x$ is the rounded population in thousands, so $x=249$.
